name: Jamf: API Client Attack Paths to Tenant
description: Display up to 4 edges in attack paths originating from Jamf API Clients with a matching name or name starting with DEMO targeting the tenant
query:
MATCH p=(s:jamf_ApiClient)-[*1..4]->(t:jamf_Tenant)
WHERE s.name STARTS WITH 'DEMO'
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
